sources.title: Venezuela Earthquakes: Building Damage Assessment in Catia La Mar
sources.provider: Microsoft AI for Good Lab via HDX
sources.caveat: Triage aid only. Not official EMS source-of-truth. The app exports only damaged=1 features from the source layer.

sources.title: Venezuela - M 7.5 Earthquake - June 2026 - OSM & Overture Data
sources.type: context data: buildings, roads, POI, health, education, airports, seaports, Overture buildings, fAIr predictions
sources.caveat: Useful for context and exposure analysis, but national-scale Overture buildings are hundreds of MB and should remain out of the Vercel bundle until tiled/split.
